query: SELECT count(*) as total, sum(case when flagged = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as flagged, sum(case when patchedAt is not null then 1 else 0 end) as patched, round(avg(cqsScore)) as avgCqs FROM attestations LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Eyn5kJRqBeD6yp.d2b313e9fc4b --database 7wVRVJHABKxJDahFYgVfUS --execute SELECT count(*) as total, sum(case when flagged = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as flagged, sum(case when patchedAt is not null then 1 else 0 end) as patched, round(avg(cqsScore)) as avgCqs FROM attestations LIMIT 1;
